zh-cn.com_touch_butt_Begin_1: $self$没有回头，只是自然地向后挺了挺腰，好让$target$的手放得更稳。"嗯？怎么突然这么粘人？"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_Begin_2: $self$切菜的手顿了一下，随即轻笑出声，并未阻止那只游走的手。"别闹，正忙着呢……好痒。"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_Begin_3: $self$顺势向后靠进$target$的怀里，隔着布料感受掌心的温度。"真是的，一回来就不老实。"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_Begin_4: $self$稍微侧过身，不仅没有躲避，反而故意用臀部蹭了蹭$target$的手掌。
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_Begin_5: $self$浑身僵了一下，难以置信地回头看向$target$，嘴巴微张却发不出声音。
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_Begin_6: $self$手中的文件差点掉落，整个人定在原地，似乎在确认刚才的触感是否是错觉。
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_Begin_7: $self$有些不知所措地眨了眨眼，脸瞬间涨红，但没有立刻躲开。"诶？那个……$target$？"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_Begin_8: $self$尴尬地干笑了一声，试图用玩笑化解这一刻的突兀。"哈哈……这是什么新的打招呼方式吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_Begin_9: $self$的身体止不住地颤抖，死死咬住下唇，不敢发出任何声音，只能任由那只手放肆。
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_Begin_10: $self$低头盯着地面，双手紧紧抓着衣角，指关节因用力而泛白。"对不起……只要……只要不打我就行……"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_Begin_11: $self$紧闭双眼，屏住呼吸，像是在忍受某种酷刑，眼角渗出了生理性的泪水。
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_Begin_12: $self$僵直得像块木头，眼神空洞地看着前方，仿佛灵魂已经抽离了躯壳。
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_1: $self$在睡梦中皱了皱眉，喉咙里发出含糊不清的呢喃。"唔……别吵……困……"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_2: $self$翻了个身，无意识地将屁股翘得更高，像是把那只手当成了枕头的一部分。
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_3: $self$随着持续的揉捏，呼吸逐渐变得沉重，双腿在被窝里难耐地磨蹭着。"嗯……嗯……热……"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_4: $self$并没有醒来，但身体本能地对刺激做出了反应，内裤逐渐被爱液浸湿。
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_5: $self$保持着行走的姿势静止不动，只有被揉捏的臀肉呈现出诡异的凹陷形状，无法恢复。
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_6: $self$毫无知觉地凝固在时空中，随着$target$手掌的大力揉搓，臀浪在静止的时间里被强行挤压出各种淫靡的形态。
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_7: $self$像是一尊精美的人偶，无论臀部被如何掰开或拍打，脸上依旧维持着静止前那一秒的笑容。
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_8: $self$悬浮在半空的发丝纹丝不动，只有被$target$肆虐的臀部正违反物理法则地承受着持续的冲击。
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_9: $self$像触电般向前跳了一小步，捂着屁股回头瞪了$target$一眼。"呀！你手太凉了！"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_10: $self$反手拍掉了$target$的手，语气里带着几分娇嗔。"去去去，别在这儿碍手碍脚的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_11: $self$扭动身体避开了触碰，眉头微皱。"今天不想动……我很累，别闹了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_12: $self$叹了口气，把$target$的手从臀部拿开并紧紧握住。"现在不是做这个的时候，好吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_13: $self$礼貌地向旁边挪了一步，拉开了安全距离，微笑着化解尴尬。"那个，$target$先生？我想这不太合适。"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_14: $self$轻轻挡住了$target$的手，语气温和但坚定。"请自重，我们应该还没熟到这种程度吧？"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_15: $self$不动声色地转身面对$target$，巧妙地避开了接触。"是有什么东西沾在裙子上了吗？谢谢提醒。"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_16: $self$尴尬地抓了抓头发，往后退了退。"呃……这种玩笑还是不要随便开比较好哦。"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_17: $self$直接一巴掌扇了过去，眼神锐利如刀。"流氓！你在干什么！"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_18: $self$立刻大声尖叫起来，指着$target$的鼻子怒骂。"变态！离我远点！我要报警了！"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_19: $self$嫌恶地拍打着刚才被触碰的地方，仿佛沾上了什么脏东西。"恶心……别用你的脏手碰我。"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_20: $self$冷冷地盯着$target$，拿出手机开始录像。"你刚才的行为已经构成骚扰了，继续啊？"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_21: $self$的呼吸变得有些急促，原本正在做的事完全停了下来，整个人软软地靠在$target$身上。"嗯……手感好吗？要不要……再进去一点？"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_22: $self$的脸颊泛起红晕，身体随着$target$的揉捏节奏无意识地摆动。"只有手……好像有点不够了呢。"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_23: $self$转过身抱住$target$的脖子，眼神迷离地索吻。"如果你是想点火的话，恭喜你，你成功了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_24: $self$发出舒服的哼哼声，主动抓着$target$的手按向更深处。"这里……再用力一点揉……"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_25: $self$原本抗拒的身体逐渐软化，脸上露出一种复杂而羞耻的神情。"奇怪……明明不应该这样的……"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_26: $self$咬着嘴唇，眼神开始不自觉地往$target$的下半身瞟。"你……经常这样对别的女孩子吗？手法……有点过分了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_27: $self$低着头，声音细若蚊蝇，带着一丝颤抖。"那个……如果不告诉别人的话……也不是不行……"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_28: $self$像是放弃了抵抗，有些自暴自弃地靠在墙上，任由快感淹没理智。"反正……反正你也只会欺负我对吧……"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_29: $self$猛地推开$target$，脸上写满了不耐烦。"摸够了没有？我说了我在忙！"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_30: $self$僵硬地站着，语气冰冷刺骨。"三分钟了，你觉得这很有趣吗？放手。"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_31: $self$眼眶有些发红，失望地看着$target$。"我以为你只是开玩笑，但这让我感到很不被尊重。"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_32: $self$用力甩开$target$的手，一言不发地转身进屋，重重关上了门。
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_33: $self$忍无可忍地爆发了，抓起手边的东西就砸向$target$。"滚！给我滚出去！"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_34: $self$蹲在地上崩溃大哭，充满恨意地瞪着$target$。"你会遭报应的……你这个人渣！"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_35: $self$此时已经完全冷静下来，面无表情地整理好衣服。"闹够了吗？这三分钟我会记一辈子的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_butt_36: $self$趁$target$放松警惕，狠狠地踩了一脚他的脚背，趁机逃跑。

en-us.com_touch_butt_Begin_1: $self$ didn't look back, simply arching her back naturally to let $target$'s hand rest more comfortably. "Hmm? Why so clingy all of a sudden?"
en-us.com_touch_butt_Begin_2: $self$ paused her chopping for a moment, then chuckled softly, not stopping the wandering hand. "Stop it, I'm busy... that tickles."
en-us.com_touch_butt_Begin_3: $self$ leaned back into $target$'s embrace, feeling the warmth of the palm through her clothes. "Honestly, you just can't keep your hands to yourself the moment you get back."
en-us.com_touch_butt_Begin_4: $self$ turned slightly to the side, and instead of dodging, she deliberately rubbed her hips against $target$'s palm.
en-us.com_touch_butt_Begin_5: $self$ stiffened all over, looking back at $target$ in disbelief, her mouth slightly open but no sound coming out.
en-us.com_touch_butt_Begin_6: $self$ almost dropped the documents she was holding, freezing in place as if verifying if the touch just now was an illusion.
en-us.com_touch_butt_Begin_7: $self$ blinked in confusion, her face instantly flushing red, but she didn't pull away immediately. "Eh? Um... $target$?"
en-us.com_touch_butt_Begin_8: $self$ let out an awkward laugh, trying to diffuse the sudden tension with a joke. "Haha... is this some new way of saying hello?"
en-us.com_touch_butt_Begin_9: $self$'s body couldn't stop trembling; she bit her lower lip hard, daring not to make a sound, letting the hand do as it pleased.
en-us.com_touch_butt_Begin_10: $self$ lowered her head, staring at the ground, clutching the hem of her clothes until her knuckles turned white. "I'm sorry... just... as long as you don't hit me..."
en-us.com_touch_butt_Begin_11: $self$ squeezed her eyes shut and held her breath, as if enduring some form of torture, physiological tears seeping from the corners of her eyes.
en-us.com_touch_butt_Begin_12: $self$ stood stiff as a board, staring blankly ahead, as if her soul had already left her body.
en-us.com_touch_butt_1: $self$ frowned in her sleep, mumbling incoherently. "Mmm... quiet... sleepy..."
en-us.com_touch_butt_2: $self$ rolled over, unconsciously sticking her butt out further, as if treating the hand as part of the pillow.
en-us.com_touch_butt_3: $self$'s breathing grew heavier with the continued kneading, her legs rubbing restlessly under the covers. "Nn... ah... hot..."
en-us.com_touch_butt_4: $self$ didn't wake up, but her body instinctively reacted to the stimulation, her panties gradually becoming soaked with fluid.
en-us.com_touch_butt_5: $self$ remained frozen in her walking pose, only the flesh of her kneaded buttocks showing an eerie indentation that wouldn't recover.
en-us.com_touch_butt_6: $self$ remained solidified in spacetime without sensation, her glutes forcibly squeezed into lewd shapes in the frozen time by $target$'s rough hands.
en-us.com_touch_butt_7: $self$ was like an exquisite doll; no matter how her buttocks were spread or slapped, her face maintained the smile from the second before time stopped.
en-us.com_touch_butt_8: $self$'s floating hair didn't move an inch, only her buttocks, ravaged by $target$, endured the continuous impact in defiance of physics.
en-us.com_touch_butt_9: $self$ jumped forward as if electrocuted, covering her butt and glaring back at $target$. "Eek! Your hands are too cold!"
en-us.com_touch_butt_10: $self$ slapped $target$'s hand away with the back of her hand, her tone carrying a warning mixed with petulance. "Shoo, shoo, don't get in my way here."
en-us.com_touch_butt_11: $self$ twisted her body to avoid the touch, frowning slightly. "I don't feel like moving today... I'm tired, stop it."
en-us.com_touch_butt_12: $self$ sighed, removing $target$'s hand from her hip and holding it tight. "Now isn't really the time for this, okay?"
en-us.com_touch_butt_13: $self$ politely stepped aside to create a safe distance, smiling to ease the awkwardness. "Um, Mr. $target$? I don't think this is appropriate."
en-us.com_touch_butt_14: $self$ gently blocked $target$'s hand, her tone gentle but firm. "Please have some respect. We aren't close enough for this yet, are we?"
en-us.com_touch_butt_15: $self$ quietly turned to face $target$, skillfully avoiding the contact. "Is there something on my skirt? Thanks for letting me know."
en-us.com_touch_butt_16: $self$ scratched her head awkwardly and backed away. "Uh... it's better not to make jokes like that."
en-us.com_touch_butt_17: $self$ slapped him directly, her eyes sharp as knives. "Pervert! What are you doing!"
en-us.com_touch_butt_18: $self$ immediately screamed, pointing at $target$'s nose and scolding. "Creep! Stay away from me! I'm calling the police!"
en-us.com_touch_butt_19: $self$ slapped the spot that was touched in disgust, as if she had gotten something dirty on it. "Disgusting... don't touch me with your dirty hands."
en-us.com_touch_butt_20: $self$ stared coldly at $target$ and took out her phone to start recording. "Your behavior constitutes harassment. Want to continue?"
en-us.com_touch_butt_21: $self$'s breathing quickened; she stopped what she was doing completely and leaned limply against $target$. "Mmm... does it feel good? Do you want to... go a little deeper?"
en-us.com_touch_butt_22: $self$'s cheeks flushed, her body swaying unconsciously to the rhythm of $target$'s kneading. "Just hands... doesn't seem like enough anymore."
en-us.com_touch_butt_23: $self$ turned around and wrapped her arms around $target$'s neck, her eyes glazed over as she sought a kiss. "If you were trying to turn me on, congratulations, you succeeded."
en-us.com_touch_butt_24: $self$ hummed in pleasure, actively taking $target$'s hand and pressing it deeper. "Here... rub a little harder..."
en-us.com_touch_butt_25: $self$'s initially resistant body gradually softened, a look of complex shame appearing on her face. "Weird... it shouldn't be like this..."
en-us.com_touch_butt_26: $self$ bit her lip, her eyes involuntarily drifting toward $target$'s lower body. "Do you... do this often to other girls? Your technique... is a bit too much."
en-us.com_touch_butt_27: $self$ lowered her head, her voice as quiet as a mosquito's, trembling slightly. "Um... if you don't tell anyone... I guess it's okay..."
en-us.com_touch_butt_28: $self$ seemed to give up resistance, leaning against the wall in self-abandonment as pleasure overwhelmed her reason. "Anyway... you're just going to bully me anyway, right..."
en-us.com_touch_butt_29: $self$ pushed $target$ away abruptly, impatience written all over her face. "Haven't you touched enough? I said I'm busy!"
en-us.com_touch_butt_30: $self$ stood stiffly, her tone bone-chillingly cold. "It's been three minutes. Do you think this is funny? Let go."
en-us.com_touch_butt_31: $self$ eyes reddened slightly as she looked at $target$ in disappointment. "I thought you were just joking, but this makes me feel very disrespected."
en-us.com_touch_butt_32: $self$ flung $target$'s hand away forcefully, turned around without a word, went into the room, and slammed the door shut.
en-us.com_touch_butt_33: $self$ exploded, unable to bear it anymore, grabbing whatever was at hand and throwing it at $target$. "Get out! Get the hell out!"
en-us.com_touch_butt_34: $self$ squatted on the ground and broke down crying, staring at $target$ with hatred. "You'll pay for this... you scumbag!"
en-us.com_touch_butt_35: $self$ calmed down completely, organizing her clothes expressionlessly. "Are you done? I'll remember these three minutes for the rest of my life."
en-us.com_touch_butt_36: $self$ took advantage of $target$ letting his guard down to stomp hard on his instep and ran away.
